scene.message: Yukino: Wasn't Sennen-Mannen{nl} Hall a penny-candy shop?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Odd wares for a{nl} penny-candy shop.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Wow! Pretty jewels~{waitkey}Hey Papa, buy them, buy{nl} them~{color:3}♥{color:0}{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What is this shop?{waitkey}A penny-candy shop? Ah{wait_fr:30}, the{nl} buck-toothed comedian?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Penny candy is a{nl} curious thing.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Hey hey, why's there a{nl} penny-candy shop at school?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Come to think of it,{nl} it's not cold in this shop.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Oh? This place isn't{nl} frozen. I wonder why?{waitkey}{ret}
